---
title: "IDENTIFICACIÓN DEL AUTOR**"
subtitle: "Investigaciones en gestión del riesgo de desastres para Colombia"
author: "UNGRD"
date: "2021"
title-block-banner: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?q=80&w=2072"
---

# **IDENTIFICACIÓN DEL AUTOR**


Gabriel Bernal		[https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=wYtazboAAAAJ](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=wYtazboAAAAJ)  
Omar Darío Cardona 		[https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8233-5450](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8233-5450)

#
